data.description:
## Phase 2 of the reconciler vendor-adapter seam (follow-up to 44be / ADR 0035)

Phase 1 (44be) authored ADR 0035, established `adapters/jira/`, and moved the one loader-safe, zero-patch-site module (`jira_fields.py`). This ticket completes the physical migration the ADR lays out. It is larger because it must touch the file-location dynamic loader and a broad module-qualified test-patch surface — do it deliberately.

## What
- Move the `acli*` cluster (acli.py, acli_cli_ops.py, acli_graph.py, acli_rest.py, acli_subprocess.py) into `adapters/jira/`, migrating ALL ~29 test patch strings + importers atomically (one binding site per symbol; no re-export shims tests patch at the old path).
- Move `adf.py`, `outbound_fields.py`, `comment_limits.py` AND update the file-location loader (`_loader.lazy_load` / `__main__._load_sibling_keyed` / the `spec_from_file_location` sites) to discover the new sub-package directory — these are location-pinned by the loader today.
- Rewire the differ/apply leak sites (outbound_differ, inbound_differ, differ, classify, reconcile_check, baseline_shadow, apply_inbound_records, outbound_links, binding_walk, reconcile) to depend on the backend interface rather than `adapters/jira/` concretely.
- Update `.github/module-size-allowlist.txt` + `.github/module-size-ceilings.txt` PATHS for any over-cap file moved (e.g. inbound_differ.py, reconcile.py).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] acli* + adf/outbound_fields/comment_limits relocated under adapters/jira/ with the loader updated for subdir discovery
- [ ] All test patch targets + importlib/string refs updated; full suite green (no regressions vs baseline)
- [ ] Differ/apply core depends on the backend interface, not adapters/jira/ concretely
- [ ] Module-size allowlist + ceilings PATHS updated for any relocated over-cap file
- [ ] Retire any transitional shims
data.title: Reconciler vendor-adapter seam Phase 2: relocate acli* + adf/outbound_fields into adapters/jira/
